name: Your Full Name
title: MSCS Researcher | AI & Computer Vision
bio: I am a Computer Science graduate researcher specializing in few-shot learning, computer vision, and vision transformers. My work focuses on developing data-efficient deep learning methods for real-world applications.
researchStatement: My research lies at the intersection of few-shot learning and computer vision, with a focus on enabling models to generalize from limited labeled data using Vision Transformers and domain adaptation techniques.
